title: CLOTHING AND DIAPER BANK - 211info
text: A FAMILY PLACE NEWBERG CLOTHING AND DIAPER BANK Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides diapers, children's clothing, maternity clothing, and other children's items as available. Families can receive a supply of 15 diapers per child as long as supplies are available. 600 E 6th Street Newberg, OR 97132 Eligibility: Diapers and children's clothing: Families with children ages 0-5 Maternity clothing: Unrestricted Hours: Thursday 10am-noon Email (503) 472-4020 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 472-4020 Other (971) 241-9258 Text Marisela Huizar Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in; call or text for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Yamhill County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located at Edwards Elementary School in a detached building Services: Baby Clothing Children's Clothing Diapers Maternity Clothing Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HEALTHY FAMILIES OREGON INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENTING EDUCATION GROUPS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - THERAPEUTIC CLASSROOM AND RELIEF NURSERY SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
